title: Implement scoped managed local instructions repair

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement GitHub #1064 by making doctor surface a safe, scoped command-owned repair for missing or stale .agentic-workspace local agent instructions.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep the repair scoped to the configured .agentic-workspace/<agent instructions file>; do not make agents use a broad workspace upgrade for this single managed surface; preserve existing init/upgrade behavior.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Use an upgrade submode and doctor repair action if that fits the current lifecycle model better than a new top-level command.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add scoped managed-local-instructions repair mode, route doctor to it, regenerate generated command adapters, and validate focused plus workspace and contract proof.
canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py::test_doctor_offers_scoped_repair_for_missing_workspace_local_agent_instructions -q', 'make test-workspace', 'make lint-workspace', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node']
canonical_core.completion_criteria: ['Doctor reports a safe repair action for missing or stale .agentic-workspace local instructions.', 'The repair action points to a scoped command that writes only the configured managed local instructions file.', 'The scoped command restores the file and leaves broad lifecycle upgrade as unnecessary for this case.', 'Generated command adapters and contracts include the new repair option.']

completion_criteria: Doctor reports a safe repair action for missing or stale .agentic-workspace local instructions.
The repair action points to a scoped command that writes only the configured managed local instructions file.
The scoped command restores the file and leaves broad lifecycle upgrade as unnecessary for this case.
Generated command adapters and contracts include the new repair option.
